title: Conditional key rename — swap one key, leave the rest
description: `{[K in keyof T as K extends "id" ? "_id" : K]: T[K]}`. Renames a single specific key (`id` → `_id` — Mongo-style); other keys pass through unchanged.
notes: Only `id` is renamed; the resolved shape requires `_id` and ignores the original `id`, so a value with `id` (and no `_id`) fails while the pass-through keys (`name`, `createdAt`) are still required.
schema: createValidate(RT.object({_id: RT.number(), name: RT.string(), createdAt: RT.date()}))
generated: function YOw_lHtd9XN(v){return (typeof v === 'object' && v !== null && Number.isFinite(v._id) && (v.createdAt instanceof Date && !isNaN(v.createdAt.getTime())) && typeof v.name === 'string')}
